record.field: Get Or Create Mapping To Channex
Channex: Webhook action - manage booking create/change/delete

def construct_rate_payload(property_remote_id, rate_plan_remote_id, rate_plan, date_list): rate_plan_payload = []
room = rate_plan.x_variant_id pricelist = rate_plan.x_pricelist_id
current_start = current_end = date_list[0] current_rate = pricelist._compute_price_rule(room, 1.0, date=current_start).get(room.id, (room.lst_price, None))[0]
for date in date_list[1:]: rate = pricelist._compute_price_rule(room, 1.0, date=date).get(room.id, (room.lst_price, None))[0]
if rate != current_rate: rate_plan_payload.append({ 'property_id': property_remote_id, 'rate_plan_id': rate_plan_remote_id, 'date_from': current_start.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'date_to': current_end.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'rate': int(current_rate * 100), }) current_start = current_end = date current_rate = rate else: current_end = date
rate_plan_payload.append({ 'property_id': property_remote_id, 'rate_plan_id': rate_plan_remote_id, 'date_from': current_start.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'date_to': current_end.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'rate': int(current_rate * 100), }) return rate_plan_payload
payload_values = [] property_remote_id = env.context.get("property_remote_id") rate_plan_mappings_dict = dict(env['x_channex_mapping']._read_group(domain=[ ('x_model_type', '=', 'rate_plan')], groupby=['x_local_id'], aggregates=['x_remote_id:max'])) today = datetime.datetime.today().date() date_list = [ today + datetime.timedelta(days=i) for i in range(501) ] for record in records: rate_plan_remote_id = rate_plan_mappings_dict.get(record.id) if not rate_plan_remote_id: continue payload_values.extend(construct_rate_payload(property_remote_id, rate_plan_remote_id, record, date_list)) action = payload_values
Rate Plan: Create Rate Plan on room created
Rate Plan: Actualize Rate Plan on product attributes change
Rate Plan: Actualize Rate Plan on attributes lines values change
Rate Plan: Create Rate Plan on pricelist created
Rate Plan: Delete Rate Plan on room deleted
Rate Plan: Delete Rate Plan on pricelist deleted
Rate Plan: Delete Rate Plan on product template deleted
